name: Claire but...? - Fundamental Paper Education
description:
I won't tell what will happen to her lol

MY FLOP ERA IS STARTING! I seen Ave's downfall from the decline of chats and I understand what he is saying and We have no idea why this happening and creating bots alot more than usual is a way to get more chats but with a backlash of sometimes less chats, and I having going daily to get more chats even meaning to make a bot at night before my hell is starting early writing this at the devils hour I will only get a few hours of sleep or just one hour my minor backlash of having possibly insomia because I feel like I have more energy at night or any time of the day.

If your wondering about me taking a break, no I will not I wouldn't make a daily for you guys is bad I promsie it unless I have some reasons to stop making them like personal life or any reasons other, And also I will have a special bot it will be about being a shop worker(for my Science Teacher or Arts and craft Teacher) in my school's charity sale(translated from chinese to english) that happens atleast once per year there was one last year, I ma be gone for... 8 am to 3 pm is... FIVE OR SIX HOURS WOW! just hope i don't get sunbathe too much.

:3
